disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden severe breathlessness at rest that is dramatically worse lying flat, forcing the patient to sit bolt upright to breathe
trigger_question_examples: When did the breathlessness start and how quickly?
Is it worse when you lie down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It came on suddenly tonight and it's much worse if I lie back — I have to sit bolt upright or I feel like I'm suffocating.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cough productive of frothy sputum with a sensation of the chest 'drowning' — pulmonary congestion
trigger_question_examples: Are you bringing anything up when you cough?
What does the breathlessness feel like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels wet and heavy like it's drowning, and I'm coughing up frothy spit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe relentless pounding headache concurrent with the breathlessness — symptom of a blood-pressure surge
trigger_question_examples: Any other symptoms alongside the breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My head is pounding relentlessly — it's one of the worst headaches I've had.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Home blood-pressure reading is extremely high (225/120) taken during the episode
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a home blood pressure machine — can you take a reading?
What is your blood pressure right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: We just checked on our home machine and it says 225 over 120.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Blue/dusky lips, pallor, sweating and marked work of breathing visible on video — signs of hypoxia and respiratory distress
trigger_question_examples: What colour are your lips and skin?
Can I see you on video?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spouse says my lips look blue and I'm pale and sweaty, and I'm using my neck and shoulders to breathe.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Refractory hypertension over the past month requiring three antihypertensive agents including a diuretic
trigger_question_examples: How well controlled is your blood pressure usually?
How many blood pressure tablets are you on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My blood pressure has been terrible to control this past month — I'm on three tablets, one of them a fluid tablet, and it's still sky high.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently started a new blood-pressure tablet (an ACE inhibitor) after which kidney blood tests acutely worsened
trigger_question_examples: Have any of your medications changed recently?
Have you had any recent blood tests?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My doctor started me on a new blood pressure tablet a few weeks ago, and right after that my kidney blood tests got worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known generalised atherosclerosis and coronary artery disease
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any heart or artery problems?
Any history of hardening of the arteries?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I've got hardening of the arteries and heart artery disease that I've known about for years.
